'''jadate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pulsingly|pulsingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-d-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pulsingly|pulsingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jadate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:jadate|jadate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jadatesher|jadatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jadatesherĂ«m|jadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jadatero|jadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jadateshĂ«|jadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jadateshĂ«m|jadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijadatero|gokijadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijadateshĂ«|gokijadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijadateshĂ«m|gokijadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojadankerom|gojadankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojadankeshĂ«|gojadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojadankeshĂ«m|gojadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojadankeya|gojadankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jadaterom|jadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jadatemu|jadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jadateya|jadateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijadaterom|gokijadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijadatemu|gokijadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijadateya|gokijadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:jadadate|jadadate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jadadatesher|jadadatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jadadatesherĂ«m|jadadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jadadatero|jadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jadadateshĂ«|jadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jadadateshĂ«m|jadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijadadatero|gokijadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijadadateshĂ«|gokijadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijadadateshĂ«m|gokijadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojadadankerom|gojadadankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojadadankeshĂ«|gojadadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojadadankeshĂ«m|gojadadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojadadankeya|gojadadankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jadadaterom|jadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jadadatemu|jadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jadadateya|jadadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijadadaterom|gokijadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijadadatemu|gokijadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijadadateya|gokijadadateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:jĂŠdĂŠte|jĂŠdĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jĂŠdĂŠtesher|jĂŠdĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m|jĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠdĂŠtero|jĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|jĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|jĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠdĂŠtero|gokijĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|gokijĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|gokijĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojĂŠdĂŠnkerom|gojĂŠdĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«|gojĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gojĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojĂŠdĂŠnkeya|gojĂŠdĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠdĂŠterom|jĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠdĂŠtemu|jĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jĂŠdĂŠteya|jĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠdĂŠterom|gokijĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠdĂŠtemu|gokijĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijĂŠdĂŠteya|gokijĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:jafdafte|jafdafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jafdaftesher|jafdaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafdaftesherĂ«m|jafdaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafdaftero|jafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jafdafteshĂ«|jafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafdafteshĂ«m|jafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafdaftero|gokijafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijafdafteshĂ«|gokijafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafdafteshĂ«m|gokijafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojafdafnkerom|gojafdafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojafdafnkeshĂ«|gojafdafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafdafnkeshĂ«m|gojafdafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojafdafnkeya|gojafdafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafdafterom|jafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafdaftemu|jafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jafdafteya|jafdafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafdafterom|gokijafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafdaftemu|gokijafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijafdafteya|gokijafdafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
